name: product-support-golden-set
description: Golden Q&A set for support policy evaluation

items.question: What is the refund window for unused products?
items.expected_answer: Refunds are available within 30 days for unused products.
items.reference_context: Refunds are available within 30 days for unused products. Contact support with your order ID.

items.question: How long does standard shipping take?
items.reference_context: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express options are available at checkout.

items.question: When is customer support available?
items.expected_answer: Support is available Monday to Friday, 9am-6pm Central Time.
items.reference_context: Support hours are Monday to Friday, 9am-6pm Central Time.

items.question: When are enterprise invoices generated?
items.expected_answer: Invoices are generated on the first business day of each month.
items.reference_context: Invoices are generated on the first business day of each month for enterprise accounts.

items.question: How often should API keys be rotated?
items.expected_answer: API keys must be rotated every 90 days.
items.reference_context: API keys must be rotated every 90 days. MFA is required for admin accounts.
